task: Find out the cold and flu forecast and today's air quality in Champaign, IL.
graderReasoning: The agent reached the correct Weather.com pages for Champaign, IL and extracted today's air quality accurately from both the rendered page and embedded data: AQI 39, category Good, primary pollutant O3 (Ozone), with the site text stating air quality poses little or no risk. For cold & flu, the agent navigated to the Champaign cold-and-flu forecast page and the rendered page showed the Extended 15 Day Flu Forecast for Wednesday, May 13 with the visible risk scale including 'Very Low' to 'Very High'; the final answer reported today's cold/flu forecast as 'Very Low,' which is supported by the page text captured in the trajectory. Thus the requested information was found and reported.
final_result_response:
For Champaign, IL on Weather.com:

- Cold & flu forecast: Very Low flu risk today.
- Today’s air quality: AQI 39, Good.
  - Primary pollutant: O3 (Ozone)
  - Weather.com notes the air quality is satisfactory and poses little or no risk.
action_history: Opening Weather.com: const p1 = await openTab('https://weather.com/');
Opening Champaign weather page: await page.locator('e20').click();
Opening air quality page: await page.locator('e20').click();
Opening Champaign air quality URL: await openTab('https://weather.com/forecast/air-quality/l/ce976558a76092ef14be3dd6789e36e340924b1fddf31066980173ffb5bce0ed');
Opening cold and flu forecast: await openTab('https://weather.com/forecast/cold-flu/l/ce976558a76092ef14be3dd6789e36e340924b1fddf31066980173ffb5bce0ed');
Capturing API on fresh navigation: const pCold2 = await openTab('about:blank');
